attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
 STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
 STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME,
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTACHED_DOCUMENT_ID,   
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.DOCUMENT_ID,             
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.CREATION_DATE,           
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.CREATED_BY,              
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,        
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY,         
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,       
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.SEQ_NUM,                 
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ENTITY_NAME,             
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.PK1_VALUE,               
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.PK2_VALUE,               
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.PK3_VALUE,               
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.PK4_VALUE,               
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.PK5_VALUE,               
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.AUTOMATICALLY_ADDED_FLAG,
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,  
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.PROGRAM_ID,              
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,     
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.REQUEST_ID,              
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,      
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE1,              
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE2,              
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE3,              
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE4,              
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE5,              
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE6,              
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE7,              
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE8,              
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE9,              
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE10,             
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE11,             
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE12,             
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE13,             
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE14,             
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE15,             
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.COLUMN1,                 
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.APP_SOURCE_VERSION,
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.CATEGORY_ID,
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.STATUS,
STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ORIG_ATTACH_DOC_ID  
FROM 
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS  STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS,
(
SELECT ATTACHED_DOCUMENT_ID , REFRESH_DATETIME FROM $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS
MINUS
SELECT ATTACHED_DOCUMENT_ID , REFRESH_DATETIME FROM $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS
) ACM 
WHERE 
ACM.ATTACHED_DOCUMENT_ID = STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTACHED_DOCUMENT_ID
AND ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME = STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME

SELECT CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTACHED_DOCUMENT_ID, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.DOCUMENT_ID, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.CREATION_DATE, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.CREATED_BY, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.SEQ_NUM, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ENTITY_NAME, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.PK1_VALUE, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.PK2_VALUE, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.PK3_VALUE, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.PK4_VALUE, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.PK5_VALUE, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.AUTOMATICALLY_ADDED_FLAG, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.PROGRAM_ID, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.REQUEST_ID, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE1, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE2, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE3, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE4, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE5, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE6, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE7, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE8, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE9, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE10, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE11, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE12, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE13, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE14, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ATTRIBUTE15, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.COLUMN1, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.APP_SOURCE_VERSION, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.CATEGORY_ID, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.STATUS, CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.ORIG_ATTACH_DOC_ID 
FROM GGACML.CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS
WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM GGACML.CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS)
